decontamination_notes: Real feature from spf13/cobra PR #2397 (closes #2396), merged 2026-04-25, after model training cutoffs. Adds a net-new exported positional-args validator NoDuplicateArgs(cmd *Command, args []string) error that rejects duplicate positional arguments with a 'duplicate argument %q for %q' message, matching the shape of cobra's other Args validators. Repo sliced at the PR base commit (f2878ba). External dependencies (pflag, mousetrap, go-md2man, yaml) are vendored via `go mod vendor` (vendor/ ~1MB) and the offline test command uses -mod=vendor; verified with `docker run --network none ... go test -mod=vendor` (no GOPROXY access). Apache-2.0 LICENSE preserved. Because the fail_to_pass tests reference the net-new symbol they do not compile at the base commit, so the pass_to_pass regression guard lives in a SEPARATE package (osscheck_reg) that exercises only pre-existing validators (ArbitraryArgs/NoArgs/ExactArgs) and therefore compiles and passes at base. Coverage floor: 3 fail_to_pass tests (rejects duplicates, error message format, allows unique) plus the separate-package pass_to_pass guard.
